original text:
Are you looking fast upload times? Have you tried different servers, only to find out that you aren't getting exactly what you paid for? Finding the right server can be time-consuming and frustrating, but that doesn't have to happen anymore. If you've been frustrated with your server you need to give Downtownhost a try.
We offer a variety of different tiers for you to choose from, letting you know exactly what you are getting and how much you will pay. There are 4 basic tiers to select, each with their own payment plans. The best thing about having so many different options is that you are able to control how much space you use and how fast your bandwidth is.
•	Access to a help desk 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
However, you still haven't heard the best part of using Downtownhost. What if you learned that you can get all of these same features at a price lower than they already are?
Right now, you can get all the same services and features at 60% off on your first billing. Simply use "17years" as your coupon code, and watch your price drop. That's right, you can save 60% off of your plan by using a coupon.
This means that if you chose a $4.95 per month plan, you'll only pay $1.40 a month! The bigger plan you select, the bigger your savings will be. There is nothing extra that you have to do, just put in "17years" as your coupon code and save 60% instantly! You won't find a price this low with so many features and services anywhere else, especially when you consider the fact that you can get it for 60% cheaper.
If you still need some incentive, you should be aware that there is a 30 day money back guarantee for Shared and Reseller plans. What are you waiting for? Give Downtownhost a try and save 60% with your coupon code today!
